## Meeting Purpose

[Review client progress and reassign tasks due to a team member's absence.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Hassan's Absence → Task Reassignment:** Hassan's tasks (Ramp & Brex artifact/competitor research) are reassigned to Biserastankovska and William, respectively.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Publishing Bottlenecks:** Client reviews are delaying publishing for Reed (PM review) and Hex/Redis (product team review). Tyler will join client calls to address this.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [**Client Feedback & Adjustments:** Viscom requested images for design process posts, prompting a test of the new Nanobanana image generation pipeline. Viscom also requires a focus on physical product design in content.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [**Team Transitions:** Natalie will replace Biserastankovska on content generation, starting next week. Sydney will gain capacity as U.com transitions to Bailey's team.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)

## Topics

### Client Progress & Bottlenecks

  - [**Ramp & Brex:** Hassan's absence requires task reassignment.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Ramp:** Biserastankovska to take over artifact generation and competitor research.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [**Brex:** William to take over competitor research and artifact generation.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

      - [**Risk:** This mirrors the SpectraOps situation, where a late, negative review derailed the project.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
      - [**Action:** Proactively manage expectations on review speed and purpose.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [**Hex & Redis:** Publishing is delayed by slow reviews from product teams.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

      - [**Redis:** VP of Growth confirmed the product team is reviewing. Ifeoluwa is already addressing minor feedback from Amanda on four articles.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [**Nivan:** Calibration block is complete; Aida will review today. Looker dashboard is set up.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

      - [**Request:** Images to illustrate design processes.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

      - [**Guidance:** Content must focus on physical product design to match client intent.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [**Cresta:**](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
      - [**Action:** Ifeoluwa to check for artifact feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
      - [**Action:** Aida to use Tamara's Nivan process (product deep dives → artifacts) after tomorrow's deep dive.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [**Action:** Ifeoluwa to deliver the calibration blog post by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [**Fleet:**](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
      - [**Action:** Andi to lead today's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
      - [**Status:** Client has been notified of the Phase 2 transition to Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [**SpectraOps:** Content generation will continue this week to build a buffer for a potential conversion, as the writer (Ian) is out next week.](https://fathom.video/share/655GCPdvtXgxYMzAaNxppgbN3XQh8rj5?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
